subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Heart's Desire! Thou beholdest Thy chosen ones in tribulations beyond compare, while Thy servants have risen against them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و مقصودی تری اصفیائک فی شده لایقاس بها دونها قد قام العباد بینه و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
